name: Worker-Mode-for-Claude-Code
description: Worker Mode for Claude Code: a foreman identity protocol that shifts the main session's default instinct from doing to delegating. Delegation is enforced via tool-stripping (coordinator agent has no Write/Edit/MultiEdit) and backend routing (enforce-backend hook denies Task calls to the wrong backend, detect-omc-failure hook writes a failure marker on PostToolUseFailure to prevent silent fallback). Set WORKER_MODE_BACKEND=legacy to route to legacy workers instead of the default OMC backend. Includes worker agents and delegation observability tools.

workerLogPath.description: Absolute path to the unified delegation worker-log jsonl file. plugin.json has no native required-config mechanism, so this requirement is enforced at runtime in two layers: the SessionStart hook (hooks/check-config.mjs) surfaces a NON-BLOCKING reminder via additionalContext if WORKER_LOG_PATH is unset or non-absolute (this config check never blocks the session), and record-worker.mjs hard-fails before writing a record if it is unset or non-absolute. This field documents the contract; the live value is read from the WORKER_LOG_PATH environment variable.
